# OWASP Agentic Skills Top 10 - Contribution Template

## Issue Type
- [ ] Bug report
- [ ] Feature request
- [ ] Security vulnerability
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] New risk scenario
- [ ] Mitigation enhancement
- [ ] Research contribution

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of your contribution.

## Context
- **AST Number**: (e.g., AST01, AST02, etc.)
- **Platform**: (OpenClaw, Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code, All)
- **Severity**: (Critical, High, Medium)

## Details

### For New Risk Scenarios
- **Attack Vector**: Describe how the attack works
- **Real-World Evidence**: Links to CVEs, research, or incidents
- **Impact**: What damage can be caused
- **Affected Platforms**: Which agent platforms are vulnerable

### For Mitigation Enhancements
- **Current Mitigation**: Reference existing mitigation
- **Proposed Improvement**: New or enhanced mitigation strategy
- **Implementation**: Code examples, configuration changes, or process improvements
- **Testing**: How to validate the mitigation works

### For Research Contributions
- **Research Source**: Academic paper, security report, or analysis
- **Key Findings**: Summary of relevant findings
- **Relevance to AST**: How this relates to agent skill security
- **Evidence**: Supporting data or examples

## Supporting Evidence
- Links to research papers, CVEs, or security reports
- Code samples or proof-of-concept
- Screenshots or logs (if applicable)

## Proposed Changes
Describe the specific changes you'd like to make to the documentation.

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md) guidelines
- [ ] My contribution follows the project's style and structure
- [ ] I have tested any code examples provided
- [ ] I have included references for any claims made
- [ ] My contribution is original work or properly attributed

## Contact Information
- **Name**: 
- **Email**: 
- **Organization**: (optional)
- **GitHub Username**:
